text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-yeppers! It's the one I bought with you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I just put an itsy-bitsy teenie bit on! I'd hate t'see
it waste 'way in my bag...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I gotcha. But you know, you're not going to get
used to it unless you wear it.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I-I know, but... that lipstick's chock full of
mem'ries from our shopp'n trip... I want it t'last...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ahem... W-well, personally, I'm hoping you use it up sooner rather than later.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Cause then we'll be able to go shopping again,
won't we? Only if you... want to, of course.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wow... 'Course I wanna go! I-I'll apply 'nother
coat—no, thirty coats!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, your lips are gonna hate you if you do
that.
